q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: Sink is target.parent.mkdir(...) which performs filesystem directory creation, an irreversible side effect.

q2_observable_after_return.evidence: Not evaluated; decision made at Q1.

q3_result_in_memory.evidence: Not evaluated; decision made at Q1.

mock_guidance.target: Mock pathlib.Path.mkdir to intercept the directory creation call on line 132.
mock_guidance.capture: Capture the Path object (target.parent) on which mkdir is called to verify whether the user-supplied 'name' parameter enables path traversal outside BASE_EXPORT_DIR.
mock_guidance.fake_behavior: Replace mkdir with a no-op that records the call arguments without creating any directories on disk, allowing execution to continue to the return statement.
notes: The function also returns a JsonResponse containing str(target), which could be used for secondary validation of the injected path.
Patch at the pathlib.Path.mkdir level rather than the function level to precisely intercept the dangerous sink.
